This short documentary offers an intimate glimpse into the creator's journey through the paths that led him to conceive this personal diptych, where he embraces his duality in this visceral desire to celebrate nature every day.

results.title: From Land to Sea
results.overview: The documentary explores the intimate and political story of the participants of the Global Sumud Flotilla, a civilian and non-violent mission that in September 2025 attempted to bring humanitarian aid to Gaza, amid the siege and genocide perpetrated by Israel. From the harbour to departure, the film recounts the preparation of the largest civilian humanitarian mission by sea organised for Palestine. Alongside the mission, the Italian mobilisations that emerged around the call “Blocchiamo tutto” (Let's block everything), launched by the dockworkers involved in the Flotilla, come to light. Amid drone attacks, demonstrations, rallies and institutional promises withdrawn when needed, the journey becomes a concrete metaphor for the will of peoples to overcome the limits and hypocrisies of the international community.

results.overview: A found-footage détournement of retail-theft surveillance, in which the criminalizing gaze of the surveillance footage is subverted by recasting capitalism as an abusive, carceral parent. Quotes transcribed from YouTube creators, who were kicked out of their homes as teens, are repurposed to ‘speak back’, buttressed by ‘poor’ low-resolution videos of stealing. Hansel and Gretel Get Kicked Out allegorizes capitalism as an abusive parent by reconfiguring dissociated internet clips into a unified chorus of forlorn rage. Music from Flowers of Romance by Michel Henritzi.

results.title: Conversations with My Dead Friends

results.title: Khostrov's Heart
results.overview: There is a dark secret in the Khosrov Forest that dates back centuries. Iago has long since found the chest containing the heart of king Khosrov Kotak, hidden in the rocks as the source of the forest’s life force. However, it remains closed to him, as it can only be opened with the blood of a royal heir.  From that moment on, Iago and Marusik are doomed to wait, searching for the only one through whom they will be able to open the chest and finally seize the power and authority of the forest.

results.title: Dragged in Between
results.overview: A young girl awakens alone in a forest with no memory of how she arrived, her only possession a small instant camera. While searching for answers, she discovers an abandoned cabin hidden among the trees. Inside are signs of previous life and a strange drawing of a human/animal figure.  As time passes, marked by days on a chalkboard, her appearances deteriorate. She becomes obsessed with the creature, covering the cabin walls with drawing and photographs. She realises the figure can only be seen through the camera, never with her own eyes.  One night, she is awakened by a low hum and sees the figure watching her in the distances. She cases it into the forest until it led her to a hollow tree and disappears. She takes a photo as proof, but as she turns back, something drags her into the darkness, dropping the camera.  The final image develops, revealing not the tree, but her looking at the tree.

results.title: The President vs. The Fed
results.overview: President Trump’s unprecedented challenges to the Federal Reserve — and what it means for the economy. FRONTLINE traces the battle between Trump and the Fed as the central bank steers the economy through an increasingly precarious moment.

results.title: Closing Time
results.overview: After an injury on service, a high-strung chef must work with his estranged drug-addled brother to finish a signature dish for a critic

results.title: Out of Phase
results.overview: An audio engineer begins hearing eerie noises coming from inside the wall. Fearing they may be losing their mind, they decide to record the sounds and analyze them, only to discover something supernaturally horrifying may be lurking on the other side.

results.title: Insufficient Fare
results.overview: A discarded MetroCard defends its legacy against a city that’s moved on, tracing its rise as a New York icon before facing obsolescence with a nostalgic farewell.

results.title: Cocoon
results.overview: Inspired by Edogawa Ranpo’s novel, A Brute’s Love

results.title: СМП-340
results.overview: Working with the archive, I observe how documentary memory conflicts with personal memory—this sense of displacement and substitution creates a complex system of distortions, reminiscent of a dream. I am fascinated by how layers of memory intertwine, erase each other, rewrite, and form new meanings.

results.title: Evolution of a Heroic Act
results.overview: A small warm sees a plan dropping a bomb onto his city and accidentally kicks off a chain reaction that inadveredley saves it, turning him into a hero whose name is doomed to be forgotten.

results.title: The Nymph and the Cyclops
results.overview: When a obsessive, hopeless-romantic tries to pursue a woman he’s in love with, he will stop at nothing to get her, even if it means he has to make life-changing and devastating decisions.

results.title: Premer Tori
results.overview: During a launch journey, a simple doctor meets a carefree young woman and her parents, and as they spend time together on the river, an unexpected romance begins to blossom.

results.title: Der fliegende Holländer - Wiener Staatsoper
results.overview: The sailor's daughter Senta takes pity on the centuries-old legendary figure of the Flying Dutchman. He was condemned by Satan to sail the world's oceans until a woman frees him from this curse through her loyalty. One day, when Senta's father returns home from a long voyage with a mysterious man, Senta is the only one who recognizes the Flying Dutchman in the sinister foreign captain. At the cost of self-destruction, she decides to redeem him. Director Christine Mielitz and her set designer Stefan Mayer see Daland's and the Dutchman's ships as an image of the entire world, of life itself, in which we all have to find our way around.

results.title: Epidemic
results.overview: By 2029, North America has been ravaged by a mysterious virus that quickly turns its victims into blood thirsty savages. Three men from Europe land in the now deserted North American suburbs to try to take out as much infected as possible, but their mission goes horribly wrong.

results.title: Almost There or a Weenie
results.overview: Twenty-year-old Lotar functions on the outer fringes of his own ambitions – he lives with his grandmother, lacks courage, inspiration and self-belief, while reality seems to constantly undermine his self-worth. He seeks refuge in his imagination, where he takes on the persona of a confident rapper.

results.title: Ghosts in the Fog
results.overview: From the team behind Never Hike Alone, Ghosts in the Fog: an animated Friday the 13th fan film follows three friends – Lana, Dom, and Brandon – who get lost in a mysterious fog while camping near Crystal Lake and mistakenly enter the hunting grounds of Jason Voorhees.

results.title: Hope For The Guadalupe
results.overview: On July 4th, 2025, catastrophic flash flooding swept through the Texas Hill Country. The river rose more than 37 feet in a matter of hours, and entire communities along its banks were forever changed. In the days that followed, an extraordinary response unfolded. Search and rescue teams, volunteers, and organizations from across the state and the nation converged on the Guadalupe. As the land and river begin to recover, so too do the people who call it home.

results.title: Out of Options
results.overview: Lee Elbaz, a 36-year-old Israeli, was arrested by the FBI, exposing a global fraud industry. While serving 22 years in prison, she maintains her innocence as the industry’s leaders evade punishment.

results.title: The City of the Shattered Sun Episode 1 - The fall of the Elites
results.original_title: The City of the Shattered Sun Episode 1 - The fall of the Elites
results.overview: When two armed burglars break into the home of a powerful Elite, they quickly realise they have made a catastrophic mistake. Outmatched and outgunned, the encounter sets off a chain of events that sends the Elite hurtling through a malfunctioning teleporter and stranding him alone in the wasteland outside the city walls — where something is already watching.

results.title: Kacher Keu
results.overview: Misunderstood by her own brother, a young woman accidentally offends his boss, but after apologizing, the two gradually fall in love, only to face opposition from her brother and sister-in-law, who are determined to keep them apart.

results.title: Fara Sense Filmul
results.overview: Fără Sense is a Romanian vertical-first mockumentary series set inside a chaotic modern company where nobody truly knows what they are doing, but everyone pretends they do.  Blending workplace comedy, internet culture and social satire, the series explores burnout, pointless meetings, corporate ego clashes, social media obsession and the absurd realities of modern work life through a fast paced and highly relatable format built specifically for the mobile generation.  At the center of the story is Andrei Severin, the real life CEO of the company behind the project, playing a fictionalized version of himself in a self aware portrayal of leadership inside a collapsing corporate ecosystem.  Combining actors, creators and internet personalities, Fără Sense turns modern work culture into cinematic chaos.

results.title: Flana
results.overview: Zahraa returns to her childhood home in Baghdad, haunted by the disappearance of her friend Noor twenty years ago. During her search, she meets Laila (22) at the same shelter where Noor was last seen. Zahraa discovers that many girls are abandoned by their mothers due to gender-based violence. She realizes how the war on Iraq reinforced patriarchal systems, compelling mothers to leave their baby daughters behind in a society that rejects them.

results.title: Fervent Hope
results.overview: An optimistic young Viking is faced with a long journey in order to cure his dying sister's disease.

results.title: Selah
results.overview: When Selah, a determined teen, takes on a solo road trip from Texas to California to deliver a designer puppy for cash, both her responsibilities and emotions get tested to the limit, ultimately revealing her real reason for the trip.

results.title: Remind Me Again
results.overview: Pained by grief and equipped with a special device, Changez enters his memories to revisit his love.

results.title: The Intervention
results.overview: A woman rushing home to meet a date is blindsided by an unexpected intervention from friends and family, only to discover her bewildered Hinge match has also been roped into it too.

results.title: Are The Stars Alive?
results.overview: Are The Stars Alive is a 3 minute, 35mm visual poem about the importance of curiosity and personal growth. It follows a woman who begins to trust her own instincts as she tries to understand the complexities of the universe, proving the answer to many of our questions lies within us. It also pays tribute to pioneering women, like astronomer Maria Mitchell (who the film is loosely based off of), and the women who painstakingly hand colored George Melies’ masterpieces from the early days of cinema. These women painted stories in the stars, and laid the foundation for all of us, allowing our curiosity to bloom. By hand cutting and coloring our film, frame by frame, we hope that we can honor the nameless women who inspired us to become storytellers and rebels.

results.title: The Right Way is the Wrong Way
results.original_title: The Right Way is the Wrong Way
results.overview: Roy is heading to a job interview but keeps getting lost. Along the way, he meets two characters who change his perspective on life.

results.title: Dogs and Dust
results.overview: As Edirne's city dump is cleared to make way for a new prison, the film observes the final days of the dogs who call it home.

results.title: Penguin Island
results.overview: The film—exclusive to museum/aquarium cinemas—will take audiences to the untouched landscapes of a fantastical island wilderness, home to one of the most iconic and beloved animals on the planet. Shot on the dramatic and uninhabited sub-Antarctic Crozet Archipelago, home to over half a million breeding pairs of penguins, the film chronicles the arrival of a lone, determined male suitor, driven by instinct to return to this treeless mote in the vast Southern seas. Here, against all odds, he must find a special someone among a cacophony of colony rivals, protect a precious egg, and start a family.

results.title: An Eye For An Eye Chart
results.original_title: An Eye For An Eye Chart
results.overview: A pregnant woman's warped vision sparks a darkly comedic revenge fantasy exposing the absurdity of medical misogyny.

results.title: Echoes of the Night
results.overview: At 14, Neptune abruptly leaves her childhood home with her mother, while her father is mysteriously absent. Twenty years later, she returns, driving from the airport through the countryside and dark, rainy forests, seeking to reconcile with her estranged, ill father. Navigating long-buried emotions and unfamiliar roads, her journey takes a turn as she comes face-to-face with an unexpected encounter.

results.title: The Traveller
results.overview: A guilt ridden man goes back in time to find and kill the person who he believes ruined his life.

results.title: Christel de Laat: En Door?!
results.overview: Actress Christel de Laat talks about her life motto, ‘En door!’, with her characteristic blend of humour, self-deprecation and emotion. For years, that motto drove her forward: don’t whinge, don’t stand still, life goes on and the sun rises for a reason. Until the moment when, lying on the gynaecologist’s examination table, she suddenly realised that pausing more often and simply feeling might be better.

results.title: Si’r det bar’
results.overview: Series on Ultra about a young girl that starts at a new school and tells a lie that ends up getting her in trouble.

results.title: Д-76
results.overview: A lonely postal courier inherits his deceased father's camera. Immersed in the world of film photography, he begins hunting for crime stories, unaware that he himself is being hunted.

results.title: My Own Bed Eating Me Alive
results.overview: Ramaz and Liza often spend time together, tasting soda and listening to electronic music. Ramaz bought some pineapples and dreams of treating Liza to some. Liza gave Ramaz a T-shirt, and he always wears it around the house.

results.title: Love Story
results.overview: One evening, my friend Alyssa confides in me: she has just started a new relationship, but it is already off to a wobbly start! Over the following months, I meet up with her to hear the latest developments. Little by little, her sister and our friends join in, each sharing their takes on the situation.

Through Yong-bu's eyes, this tragic saga weaves unseen records and KBO archives into a forgotten diaspora's requiem.

results.overview: These days, Cheng-Cheng seems different. He doesn’t play baseball anymore and stays away from the field. It feels like he has something he can’t tell anyone. His mom tries to help but doesn’t know why. The fear and confusion come from one of the adults he trusts the most. One evening, Cheng-Cheng stands by the field, holding his bat, wondering—should he swing, or not?

But when a mysterious, beautiful, delicious Gyro comes into his life, Bert must choose between his beloved girlfriend and his beloved Gyro... and protect the Gyro against all those that would take it from him...

results.title: Reunion
results.overview: When an old group of friends get a mysterious invite to a high school reunion, things take a dark turn.

results.title: Damnation Empire
results.overview: A man is about to be executed. Before, during, or after his death, he remembers fragments of his past, and navigates to find and save himself.

results.overview: In the early 1970s, young hippie Julie James embarks on a solo road trip to pursue her dream of being a singer, but quickly realizes she is in way over her head.

results.title: Vita Nova

results.overview: After twenty-two-year-old Drew visits Clearwater Psychiatric Services alone for the first time, the waiting room that he finds himself trapped inside slowly transforms into the madness he experiences within his own mind, and becomes a reflection of his own mental health.

Instead of fighting, Baddy attempts to heal the Fountain’s pain and save Candy World before everything is erased.

results.overview: One night, the lives of an old man, his wife, and a young boy who enters their home intertwine. Zbigniew, near death, reveals a lifelong secret, while the stranger’s presence becomes a catalyst for confessions. Song of the Night is an intimate tale of love, solitude, fear, and courage at life’s end.

results.title: The Idiot
results.overview: The film IDIOT is a story of two completely different young men. Rene and Emil are brought together by their desire to get something from each other's world. As if without making any promises, they suddenly find themselves in situations where it seems that the only way out is to escape.  Emil, who seems to have been given everything in life, continues to disappoint his father and overcomes all the limits of suffering. Now he is faced with a life where he has to take responsibility for everything himself. He meets Rene, from whom Emil decides that he wants to learn a lot. Rene, however, tries to keep him away from mistakes that he can no longer fix himself, but he cannot remain confident enough.  Everything starts to develop too quickly and, despite Rene's warnings, Emil ends up turning the situation against both of them. They still have to work together to find a solution. Fear has overcome the boys.

results.title: The Gooners Fight Club

results.overview: Eric and Oliver develop an unexpected bond after a hug that lasts longer than usual.

As the case unfolds, the line between performance and reality starts to blur.

When the old man blows the bloody whistle among them, unexplained and terrifying events begin in Orgil's life.

results.title: May Day!
results.overview: May Day! is a feature-length documentary which follows Oxford's thousand-year old tradition of May Morning, the largest celebration of its kind, regularly attracting over 15,000 people each year.  It is a collage-like portrait of the tradition, attempting to find out how the celebration has survived the separation between the land and its people, what the pagan festival means thousands of years after its inception, and how it shapes and contributes to our nation's sense of self.

results.title: Senioritis Stirkes Back! The Final Project
results.original_title: Senioritis Stirkes Back! The Final Project
results.overview: When a new transfer student arrives and rivals Jason's legendary procrastination, the two must face their last chance at graduation.

results.title: Elevator Killings
results.overview: An unsuspecting student takes a deadly elevator ride with a classmate.

results.title: Long Live the Factory!
results.overview: “The Factory Must Not Stop!” is a documentary film about a former giant of the Yugoslav chemical industry and the memories of its workers. A discovered archive — tens of thousands of slides and negatives — becomes an entry point into a world that no longer exists. Through images and testimonies, a representative of a new generation, Aleksandar Kostić, explores the boundary between lived experience and collective nostalgia, trying to understand why the factory continues to live on in people’s stories — as myth, trauma, or a lost ideal.

results.title: Die Russland-Route: Sind die Sanktionen sinnlos?

results.overview: Filmmaker Michael Höft and his team travel to Kyiv during the coldest winter of the war. results.title: The Making of A Man in Isolation
results.original_title: The Making of A Man in Isolation
results.overview: In December of 2025, A Man in Isolation began its development process. It took roughly eight days to complete the entire film from start to finish. The final product came out to 25 minutes, including the credit sequence. Throughout the week, there were scenes and clips that never made the final edit, with some scenes not making it due to them not fitting the vibe.  Four months on, and those clips will be seen in this documentary-like film about the creation and the process of A Man in Isolation.

For the next hundred years, Khemtid wanders the city beneath the shifting skies of Siam, bearing silent witness to the nation’s restless metamorphosis.

Will she find the courage to defy her advisor and lab partner in a bid to secure funding for her research?

results.title: Dust Bowls and Jewish Souls: Another Side of Woody Guthrie
results.original_title: Dust Bowls and Jewish Souls: Another Side of Woody Guthrie
results.overview: What does Woody Guthrie, the famous Dust Bowl balladeer and the songwriter who wrote "This Land Is Your Land," have in common with blintzes, knishes and Hanukkah songs? A whole lot more than you could possibly imagine. Hearing the name Woody Guthrie for most of us conjures images of Dust Bowl refugees from the 1930s and migrant families fleeing their soil-ravaged farms, along with those famous lyrical phrases, "This land is your land, this land is my land. From California to the New York Island." But Woody extended his horizons far beyond the Oklahoma hills of his youth. And once his wanderings and ramblings brought him to New York City in the 1940s, he was introduced - both personally and professionally - into a vibrant Jewish culture that he wholeheartedly embraced and which, ultimately, had a deep influence on his life and his music.

results.title: It Is What Is It
results.overview: With bad luck surrounding him, a clueless but outgoing boy follows a witch doctor’s cryptic map that leads to the mysterious arinola, said to turn his luck around.

results.overview: The 16th Nintama Rantarou Musical installment.

results.title: Елена Новикова: Часики
results.overview: According to Elena Novikova, from birth, every woman hears this infernal mechanism: "the ticking clock." This ticking dictates when to get married, when to have children, how to look, and where to be. By 30, this sound becomes deafening, by 45, it becomes background noise, and by 56, Novikova claims, zen finally sets in. Elena dissects every stage of the female "obstacle course": from beauty standards, ageism, maternal exploits, to menopause.

results.title: Dar Zaborava (Saga o revizionizmu)
results.overview: The Gift of Forgetting explores how the memory of World War II in the post-Yugoslavia region has been transformed into a tool of political manipulation. The film follows the ways in which historical facts are gradually reshaped, relativized, or instrumentalized within contemporary national narratives.

results.title: Free Speech Zone
results.overview: Two years following an abuse of power, students and faculty at SUNY Purchase College must grapple with a changed campus community - and the lasting cost of speaking up.

results.title: Marble & Lemons
results.overview: During their Italian vacation, a mother and her grown-up daughter are struggling to connect to and understand each other. When the daughter realizes her mother's fragility, she takes on a new responsibility. Marble and Lemons is an ode to body changes, femininity and sorority.

results.title: Shree Bukuro : The Home Calling
results.overview: A heartfelt family drama about returning to ancestral village and rediscovering the meaning of home through reconnection with family and the mountains, the story shows how embracing one’s roots can heal relationships and bring true clarity in life.

results.title: Somnophiliac
results.overview: intrusive conversations about the "social" animal - inspired by Madvin Mexis' graphic novel "I did not write this"

results.title: Blu’s

results.title: The Original Sin

results.title: The Last Band on Earth
results.overview: When the heat death of the Earth arises due to global warming, a group of four teens decide to form a band and make a documentary to immortalize their music and their lives.

results.title: The Birth of Gospel
results.overview: This episode of Chicago Stories traces the birth and growth of gospel music in Chicago in the 1930s. The story follows "The Father of Gospel", Thomas A. Dorsey, who wrote one of gospel’s early hits while coping with his grief over the death of his wife and child. It explores the roots of gospel from southern spirituals during slavery, through gospel’s early years.

results.overview: When TikTok faces a nationwide ban, three influencers fight for their livelihoods, their voices, and the First Amendment. As their efforts advance to the Supreme Court, questions swirl around the stakes, power, and control of the future of social media.

results.title: I'M GOING TO BE LATE

results.title: Our Lad
results.overview: A hardened young man battling with gang complications finds the strength to shelter his younger brother battling with his true identity. Both are forced to confront their masculinity through the gritty experience of their working class lively hoods.

results.title: Khumbu: Whispers of an Ancient Glacier
results.original_title: Khumbu: Whispers of an Ancient Glacier
results.overview: In a poetic and intimate monologue, an ancient glacier speaks to us, sharing its story.

results.title: Three sad tigers
results.overview: Amid the silent deterioration of his home and the fractured relationship between his parents, Antonio, a nine-year-old boy, discovers an abandoned shed on the outskirts of the neighborhood with his friends. Guided by a childlike intuition and the desire to solve the conflict between his parents, he decides to transform this shed into a refuge so that one of them can live there.

results.overview: A man wakes up in a room accused of being the maniacal international criminal, "Böse Barry". He must recall his past in order to defend his innocence before his deranged interrogator goes too far for answers.

results.title: The Thin Air Between
results.overview: A former pro cyclist embarks on a heart-pounding, visually breathtaking journey into the thin air between success and failure.

results.title: Still Running
results.overview: Two Serbian cinematography students set out to follow the longest relay in history, through protests, blockades, and a line of memories, tracing back to the moment it all began. An intimate and powerful film about fear, freedom, and a generation that is still running.

results.title: LAISHA - The Story of a Women's Magazine
results.overview: Since 1947, "La'Isha" has been Israel's top women's weekly. This film explores the 78-year bond between the magazine and its readers. From its male-led early years and beauty pageants to its feminist evolution, the magazine provided a "room of one's own" while fueling body image debates.

results.title: ZeNistaN A Live Documentary Experience
results.overview: A live documentary experience built around archival footage of the 90s psychedelic band ZeN and their 1996 concert at Cihangir Park. Directed by Elif Dizdaroğlu, the event evolved into a layered performance through Murat Ertel’s improvised talk and music. Blending archival footage with live Q&A and performance, the night collapsed the distance between past and present audiences. Now available on Postbellek, the project became a collective trip back into the spirit of the 90s.

results.title: Notes from the Underground
results.overview: A cross-generational oral history of Cape Town, told through the underground hip-hop scene that turned rhythm, resistance and mentorship into a living education system.

results.title: The Wind
results.overview: Sixth part of the cycle of silent short movies "Thou Art BENEDICTUS".

results.title: Les ondes déferlantes
results.overview: Radio Galère, an independent radio station in Marseille, has been on the air for over 40 years, giving voice to what we hear far too little of: the anger, the struggles, the hopes, and the stories of those whom society renders invisible in their daily lives. Through its volunteers and staff, the station is a place where speaking out becomes a political act and a tool for empowerment.

results.title: Carla and Her Legs
results.overview: Carla, who has no legs, is reduced by people around her to a curiosity rather than an artist. She lives for acrobatics, but works as an assistant in a variety show, invisible to the world of stage. When the theater begins to decline, the director offers her the chance to perform.

results.title: Bem, Un Lémur En Fuga
results.overview: A little girl who is allergic to almost everything is forced to live alone isolated from the outside world. When a small lemur brought from Madagascar to an illegal market in Mexico escapes and finds a way to the little girl's room, a strange friendship is formed.

results.title: According to Love
results.overview: Saura, Filipe, João, Beatriz, Rita, and Marchana have a language of their own, shaped by the growing pains of childhood and the uncertainties of adult life. During the summer, Saura and Filipe, once deeply connected, begin to drift apart. As they try to understand what still remains between them, their language also begins to change, and with it the group of friends they share.

results.title: The Fishermen
results.overview: A day in the mundane for two lonesome moviegoers. One an old veteran, the other a young devotee, both live in the ghosts of days gone by, observing small rituals of comfort against Adelaide's uncaring sprawl. They eventually converge on an aged cinema, in search of that certain feeling.

results.title: Braids
results.overview: Life at summer camp can be pretty challenging. It’s great to have your big sister there.

results.title: Abuela,
results.overview: An intimate, investigative documentary retracing the life of Maria Jesús Echevarría. A brilliant, overlooked Spanish writer whose story was shaped by the wrong time, the wrong systems, and the right words.

results.title: Showtime Baby
results.overview: A dysfunctional band loses their frontman 10 minutes before showtime, leaving a teenager to navigating egos, hard drugs and a little death to wrangle them back together. A loud and fast fever dream that interrogates our assumptions on identity and awakens the inner child in us all.
